_purpose: Orchestrator continuity across Claude Code sessions. The HUMAN talks to ONE AI (the orchestrator); that AI dispatches scope-specific work via the Agent tool. When the human starts a fresh Claude Code session, the new orchestrator MUST read this file early in startup so it knows: what was last being worked on, what's pending, what decisions were just made, what scopes are currently claimed, what to NOT re-do.
_protocol: Update this file at every significant decision/checkpoint. Treat it like a running session journal — newest at the bottom of recent_decisions, oldest pruned. The aggregator script `node scripts/agent-status.js` complements this with per-scope status from data/coordination/sessions/*.json.

current_orchestrator_session.primary_focus: Repo audit (5-tier punch list) — Session 1 of 4: security fix + doc truthfulness + theme build wiring

current_focus: Session 1 of audit punch list landed in v0.122.0. Ready to start Session 2 (Tier 3 Infinite-of-X migration) when next session opens.

recent_decisions.decision: Split items toxicology: ingredients hold their own tox in sidecar RON files; items are pure ingredient lists with versioned `history` array. Toxicology derived at query time from the current ingredient list.
recent_decisions.rationale: User asked: 'wouldn't it be better to just list the item and ingredients and then from that list of ingredients determines toxicology' + 'we also want to make sure we accommodate the fact that the ingredients list might change for something like Oreos.' Both improvements landed in v0.116.1.

recent_decisions.decision: Multi-AI coordination = static registry (data/coordination/agent_registry.ron) + runtime claim table (agent_sessions SQLite) + audit JSON files (data/coordination/sessions/*.json) + aggregator (node scripts/agent-status.js).
recent_decisions.rationale: User wanted a way for fresh AI sessions to check if a scope already has work in progress, see completion estimates, and know if their assigned scope is at a stop state.

recent_decisions.decision: Going forward, ALWAYS git-add untracked .rs/.ron/.csv before pushing. Saved as feedback_untracked_files.md.
recent_decisions.rationale: v0.108 created issuer_trust.rs but never staged it. CI broke 8 releases later when desktop-build CI tried fresh checkout.

Audit found federation.rs:220 + federation.rs:461 had open TODOs for client signature verification. Forward-compatible verifier landed without breaking current unsigned-client federation. Closes Tier 1.1 of the audit punch list.

recent_decisions.decision: Doc sweep landed in v0.122.0: SOP.md/STATUS.md/CONTRIBUTING.md/SYNC.md/SELF-HOSTING.md/ONBOARDING.md/Justfile/4 design docs all rewritten to drop dead `server/`, `crates/`, `native/`, `app/` paths and the dead `humanity-relay` package name.
recent_decisions.rationale: Audit Tier 2 — these docs were misleading future contributors and AI agents who'd grep for paths that no longer exist. CLAUDE.md/README/FEATURES were already correct; the rest had drifted. STATUS.md flipped 16 scaffolded systems + electrical + psychology from ✅ to ⚠️ — the 'truthfulness rule' is now stated explicitly in the header.

recent_decisions.decision: `just theme` recipe added; runs `node scripts/gen-theme-css.js` to regenerate `web/shared/theme.css` from `data/gui/theme.ron`. Wired into `just ship` so push-time always regenerates. Idempotent.
recent_decisions.rationale: Audit Tier 5 — script existed but wasn't wired into any build step, so theme.css drift was inevitable. Closes that gap.

active_scopes_to_avoid: _When this list is non-empty, another orchestrator session may be coordinating those scopes; check timestamps before claiming.

version_state.current_local_cargo_toml: see Cargo.toml — keep in sync with latest tag

src/relay/handlers/msg_handlers.rs (v0.122.0) — gossip_profile caller plumbed to forward signature parameter

docs/SOP.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, docs/SYNC.md, docs/SELF-HOSTING.md, docs/ONBOARDING.md, 4 design docs (v0.122.0) — dropped dead server/, crates/, native/, app/ paths and the dead `humanity-relay` package name

Page parity audit — done in v0.115.0. Native + web pages aligned. Only add new pages if truly needed.

Universal Button widget — built v0.113.0 + v0.114.0. Use widgets::Button, don't roll your own egui::Button.

Federation profile-signature verifier — landed in v0.122.0. Don't re-add the TODO; instead implement client-side signing when ready, then flip should_accept_profile_gossip to reject empty signatures.
Doc drift in SOP/STATUS/CONTRIBUTING/SYNC/SELF-HOSTING/ONBOARDING + 4 design docs — fixed in v0.122.0. New drift can only come from new content.

Sweep when convenient.
10 of 21 agent scopes still unaudited — check `node scripts/agent-status.js` for current list under 'Unaudited scopes'.
how_to_resume: 2. Run `git status` and `git log --oneline -10` to see recent state.
3. Read this file (orchestrator_state.json) — the running journal.
4. Run `node scripts/agent-status.js` for per-scope coordinator-friendly summary.
5. Read docs/STATUS.md and docs/FEATURES.md for the static feature inventory.
6. Check data/coordination/agent_registry.ron for the canonical scope list.
